name: restaurant-instagram-section
title: Instagram Follow Section
description: Follow-us landing section with centered Instagram handle pill (icon + @handle), Playfair bold heading with pink-purple underline accent, 2x2 grid of circular-cornered food photos, supporting tagline, and a bottom gradient pink-to-purple pill CTA. Reusable bits: the 2x2 rounded image grid, gradient-pill CTA, and Instagram handle pill.

preview.reason: Imports @/domains/shared/section-tools and @/domains/shared/components which are restaurant-app-solo internals. Requires tenant domain context. Preserved as code-reference.
